import sys
from itertools import product

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    def check(b):
        diffs = set(b[j] - b[k] for j in range(len(b)) for k in range(len(b)))
        return all(x in diffs for x in a)
    
    def backtrack(b, candidates):
        if check(b):
            return True
        if len(b) == n:
            return False
        for c in candidates:
            new_b = b + [c]
            new_cands = set()
            for x in a:
                for v in new_b:
                    new_cands.add(v + x)
                    new_cands.add(v - x)
            if backtrack(new_b, sorted(new_cands)):
                return True
        return False
    
    init_cands = set([0])
    for x in a:
        init_cands.add(x)
        init_cands.add(-x)
    
    print("YES" if backtrack([0], sorted(init_cands)) else "NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
